pageContext.name: Kento Nanami
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Kento Nanami Collectible Figure!  From the anime series Jujutsu Kaisen comes the latest Jujutsu Kaisen collectible figure. Standing at 8.7' tall and dressed in his usual business suit, this sorcerer is carrying his blunt sword with the same spotted pattern to match his tie.  Don't miss your chance to add this Kento Nanami figure to your anime figure collection today!
